creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #8)

I found a useful cross reference table:

https://developer.arm.com/downloads/-/exploration-tools/feature-names-for-a-profile

lists old and new notation in some of its tables. In the list for
"Features introduced prior to 2020" is:

Old name	New name	Short description
. . .
ARMv8.4-CondM	FEAT_FlagM	Condition flag manipulation instructions
. . .

But I still do not find any "FP16FML" notation, or even just "FML".
